headline: Uncover the latest developments among S&P500 stocks in today's session.
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index in the middle of the day on Thursday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Is Masco Corporation Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Masco Corporation has lagged behind the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish about the stock’s outlook.
